packageRules.description: grammY core + plugins move in lockstep: the plugins peer-depend on grammy ^1.x, so a grammy major breaks all three until they ship matching majors.
Automerge non-major runtime deps — CI (typecheck + compile + test) gates every merge.

Majors get a manual PR + a 3-day soak (a yanked/re-tagged release settles before it's offered) — a green test run still misses runtime behavior changes. Patch/minor auto-merge with no soak (CI-gated).

Anthropic Agent SDK stack — grouped + manual. agent-sdk peers @modelcontextprotocol/sdk ^1.29 and zod ^4 (so zod's major is pinned by it); it is 0.x, so minors are breaking, and tests miss runtime paths (setModel saga). Review by hand. Listed last so it overrides the automerge rules above.

Pin @types/node to the Node 24 LTS line. Bun targets Node 24, so the types must match; a mismatch surfaces APIs Bun doesn't implement. @types/node is an `overrides` entry (Renovate manages overrides as deps and kept proposing the v26 major), so cap it here — 24.x patches/minors still flow.
